phrase: tell dorcas i need the kitui report by friday pls
why: surface verb is 'tell' so it routes to comms message_person, but the real intent is an assigned deliverable with a deadline

phrase: can you just let linda know the feeding programme numbers are due monday
why: 'let X know' reads as a relay but it is a dated work assignment

phrase: ask cynthia to sort the october receipts before she leaves for the field
why: 'ask X to' is messaging-shaped; the durable thing is a task nobody will track otherwise

phrase: whats eunice actually working on rn
why: person question drifts to people/general lane instead of the task lane holding member activity

phrase: how many things are still open on dorcas plate
why: a how-many-about-people question routes to people, but only the task list can count

phrase: did anyone ever reply to me about the ahadi uniforms thing
why: vague complaint about a reply; needs thread history not a new message

phrase: i think i forgot to send liz that voice note about the sponsors
why: phrased as memory doubt, resolvable only by checking what was actually sent

phrase: nothing came through from maisha this week did it

phrase: push the tuesday partner call, im still in dubai
why: travel excuse framing hides a calendar mutation

phrase: whos free thursday morning for the nairobi zoom
why: 'whos free' looks like a people query but needs conflict checking

phrase: sort out the eunice thing pls

phrase: remind the girls in the ops group about the friday deadline
why: 'remind' pulls it into tasks/reminders when the action is a group post

phrase: i want cynthia looped in on the borehole one

phrase: has liz done the thing i asked her yesterday

phrase: mark the school visit as done, we did it saturday
why: 'mark done' pulls to complete_task when it is a past calendar event

phrase: actually no linda didnt finish that, put it back

phrase: whats on for me today
why: maximally vague; splits between calendar and tasks and often dead-ends in general

why: reads as a yes/no status question, needs inbox search

phrase: tell taona the payment thing is still broken
why: looks like a plain relay to a person; escalation flag is the only real path

phrase: who all can talk to you btw
why: casual chit-chat framing reads as small talk about the bot itself, routes to general instead of people

phrase: is linda able to use this thing or just me
why: yes/no question about the bot's own capability looks like a general capability question, not a roster lookup
